# Fourty

> Fourty is an open-source, multi-tenant CRM (Postgres + Row-Level Security) with
> contacts, companies, deals, tasks, notes, analytics, lead scoring, workflow
> automation, custom objects, a REST API, a typed GraphQL API, and a native MCP
> server. Every request is scoped to one workspace and gated by role-based access
> control (admin / member / viewer).

Authenticate every API request with a workspace API key:
`Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`. A key belongs to exactly one workspace and acts
at a fixed role. Create keys in Settings → API access.

## REST API

Base path `/api`. JSON in/out. Standard verbs GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE.

- Contacts: `/api/contacts`, `/api/contacts/{id}`
- Companies: `/api/companies`, `/api/companies/{id}`
- Deals: `/api/deals`, `/api/deals/{id}`
- Tasks: `/api/tasks`, `/api/tasks/{id}`
- Notes: `/api/notes`
- Activities (timeline): `/api/activities`
- Search (contacts+companies+deals): `/api/search?q=...`
- Dashboard analytics: `/api/stats/dashboard`
- Custom object records: `/api/objects/{apiName}`, `/api/objects/{apiName}/{id}`
- Custom object definitions: `/api/custom-objects` (+ `/fields`)
- Saved views: `/api/saved-views`

Writes are validated with zod and return `{ error }` + HTTP 400 on failure; RBAC
denials return HTTP 403; unknown/other-workspace records return 404 (RLS).

## GraphQL API

Single endpoint `POST /api/graphql` with `{ query, variables }`. Introspection is
enabled. Typed queries for every object: `contacts`, `contact(id)`, `companies`,
`deals`, `tasks`, `notes`, `customObjects`, `records(object)`, `record(object,id)`.
Mutations: `createContact`/`updateContact`/`deleteContact`,
`createCompany`/`updateCompany`/`deleteCompany`, and
`createRecord`/`updateRecord`/`deleteRecord` for custom objects. Errors travel in
the response body (`errors[]` with `extensions.code`); HTTP stays 200.

## MCP server (for LLM agents)

Fourty ships a self-hosted Model Context Protocol server over two transports:
- **stdio**: `FOURTY_API_KEY=<key> npm run mcp` (for Claude Desktop/Cursor).
- **HTTP**: `POST /api/mcp` with `Authorization: Bearer <key>` and a JSON-RPC body
  (single message or a batch array) — for hosted/remote MCP clients.

Both serve the same JSON-RPC methods: `initialize`, `tools/list`, `tools/call`,
`resources/list`, `resources/read`, `prompts/list`, `prompts/get`, `ping`. Tools:
`search`, `list_contacts`, `create_contact`, `update_contact`, `delete_contact`,
`list_companies`, `create_company`, `update_company`, `delete_company`,
`list_deals`, `create_deal`, `update_deal`, `delete_deal`, `list_tasks`,
`create_task`, `create_note`, `get_dashboard_stats`, `list_custom_objects`,
`list_records`, `create_record`. Delete tools are dry-run by default (pass
`confirm: true` to apply). Resources: `fourty://dashboard`, `fourty://custom-objects`.
Every tool/resource runs under the key's workspace (RLS) and role (RBAC), with
field-level permissions applied — the HTTP transport is not a bypass door.

Example Claude Desktop config entry:
```
"fourty": { "command": "npm", "args": ["run", "mcp"],
            "env": { "FOURTY_API_KEY": "frty_..." } }
```

## Migrating from Twenty

`npx @fourty/twenty-migrate --twenty-url ... --twenty-token ... --fourty-key ...`
imports companies, people, and opportunities from a Twenty workspace. Use
`--dry-run` to preview counts without writing.

## Docs

- README: overview, quickstart, configuration
- PARITY.md: honest, cited Fourty-vs-Twenty capability matrix
- docs/adr/: architecture decision records (tenancy/RLS, GraphQL, MCP, …)
